nasb.text: Then Jacob offered a sacrifice on the mountain, and called his kinsmen to the meal; and they ate the meal and spent the night on the mountain.

esv.text: and Jacob offered a sacrifice in the hill country and called his kinsmen to eat bread. They ate bread and spent the night in the hill country.

cnv.text: 雅各又在山上獻祭，叫了自己的眾兄弟來吃飯。他們吃了飯，就在山上過夜。

ccb.text: 又在山上献祭，请众弟兄吃饭。饭后，他们一同在山上过夜。

csbs.text: 于是雅各在山上献祭物，又叫他的兄弟们来吃饭。他们吃了饭，就在山上过夜。
